'''√f-w-n''' ('''fawana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dearth|dearth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dearth|dearth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √f-w-n
|-
! Lemma
| fawana
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || fawanithi || fawaniji || fawanishi || fawani
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || fawanuthuth || fawanujuj || fawanushush || fawan
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || fawanuthu || fawanuju || fawanushu || fawanu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || fawanufuth || fawanufuj || fawanufush || fawanuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fawanethe || fawaneje || fawaneshe || fawane
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fawanothoth || fawanojoj || fawanoshosh || fawan
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fawanotho || fawanojo || fawanosho || fawano
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fawanofoth || fawanofoj || fawanofosh || fawanof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fawanïf || fawanïf || fawanïf || fawanïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fawanïfïf || fawanïfïf || fawanïfïf || fawanïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fawanïf || fawanïf || fawanïf || fawanïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fawanïf || fawanïf || fawanïf || fawanïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fawanæthæ || fawanæjæ || fawanæshæ || fawanæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fawanathath || fawanajaj || fawanashash || fawan
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fawanatha || fawanaja || fawanasha || fawana
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fawanafath || fawanafaj || fawanafash || fawanaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || fawanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gofawanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokifawanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || fawannüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gofawannknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokifawannüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || fawanshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gofawannkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokifawanshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || fawanroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gofawannkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokifawanroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || fawanmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gofawannkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokifawanmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || fawansherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gofawannksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokifawansherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || fawanngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gofawannkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokifawanngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || fawanyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gofawannkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokifawanyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || fawanyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gofawannkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokifawanyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || fawannüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gofawannknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokifawannüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || fawannüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gofawannknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokifawannüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || fawannümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gofawannknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokifawannümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || fawanshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gofawannkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokifawanshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || fawanshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gofawannkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokifawanshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || fawanshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gofawannkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokifawanshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || fawanronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gofawannkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokifawanronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || fawanroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gofawannkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokifawanroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || fawanromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gofawannkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokifawanromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || fawanmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gofawannkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokifawanmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || fawanmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gofawannkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokifawanmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || fawanmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gofawannkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokifawanmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || fawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || fæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hofawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hofæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohofawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohofæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüfawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüfæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüfawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüfæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïfawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïfæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïfawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïfæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lufawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lufæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulufawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulufæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lifawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lifæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilifawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilifæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kofawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kofæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokofawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokofæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kefawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kefæwæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekefawan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekefæwæn
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
